query:
SELECT id, name, slug FROM island_guides WHERE 
  LOWER(name) LIKE '%dive%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%surf%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%snorkel%' OR 
  LOWER(name) LIKE '%reef%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%site%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%spot%' OR
  LOWER(overview) LIKE '%dive site%' OR LOWER(overview) LIKE '%surf spot%' OR LOWER(overview) LIKE '%snorkeling%'
ORDER BY name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT id, name, slug FROM island_guides WHERE 
  LOWER(name) LIKE '%dive%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%surf%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%snorkel%' OR 
  LOWER(name) LIKE '%reef%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%site%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%spot%' OR
  LOWER(overview) LIKE '%dive site%' OR LOWER(overview) LIKE '%surf spot%' OR LOWER(overview) LIKE '%snorkeling%'
ORDER BY name;
